name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Check Into Cash is located at 2245 E Irvington Rd Ste 110, Tucson, AZ 85714 in the Kino Gateway neighborhood. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 191 reviews. Call +1 520-807-9348.
description_long:
Check Into Cash was founded 30 years ago and has grown into one of the largest national short-term lending chains in the United States, with physical store locations across dozens of states including Michigan. The company positions itself as a neighborhood financial services provider, operating stores in local retail corridors alongside everyday businesses.

The company's core offering is payday loans — in Michigan, up to $600 — available both in-store and online, with same-day cash disbursement for approved in-store applicants. Beyond payday loans, Check Into Cash offers installment loans (larger amounts with longer repayment terms), title loans (using a vehicle's clean title as collateral), and a Flex Line of Credit that allows repeat draws up to a set credit limit. Ancillary services include check cashing, Western Union money transfers, bill payment, Green Dot Visa Debit Cards, money orders, and tax preparation services.

What distinguishes Check Into Cash from smaller payday operators is its multi-product platform and 30-year operating history. Customers can access several loan types under one roof depending on their needs and state eligibility, and the company holds state licenses that are displayed in-store. The Ferndale, MI location maintains extended weekday hours (8–7pm Fridays) and Saturday availability, which serves customers who cannot visit during standard business hours.

Honestly, Check Into Cash is a high-cost lender. Payday loans — regardless of brand — carry annual percentage rates that routinely exceed 300–400%. The website does not display rates directly; consumers must visit the Rates by State page or a physical store to see actual fees. This product is best understood as a last-resort cash option for consumers with no access to credit cards or personal loans, not as a routine borrowing tool. Borrowers who roll over loans will quickly accumulate fees that far exceed the original loan amount.
address: 2245 E Irvington Rd Ste 110, Tucson, AZ 85714

company_info.headquarters: 2245 E Irvington Rd Ste 110, Tucson, AZ 85714

pros: 30 years in operation — established national chain with state licensing
Same-day cash in-store for approved applicants
Payday loans available both in-store and online
Multiple loan products: payday, installment, title loans, and flex line of credit
Ancillary services (Western Union, check cashing, bill pay, Green Dot) reduce need for multiple storefronts
Extended hours including Saturdays (9am–4pm) and early Friday open (8am)
State license and retail fee schedule publicly posted in-store
cons: Michigan payday loans capped at $600 — not suitable for larger cash needs
Rates and fees not shown on the main website; requires ZIP lookup or store visit to see actual APR
Requires an active checking account — excludes fully unbanked consumers
Sundays closed — not accessible for weekend emergencies on that day
Short-term payday loans carry very high APRs typical of the industry, creating rollover risk
best_for: Consumers with an active bank account who need under $600 by end of day
Vehicle owners needing a larger emergency amount and willing to use their car title as collateral
People who need check cashing or Western Union alongside a small loan in one stop
Borrowers who have exhausted credit card and personal loan options and need a regulated storefront lender
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is best for consumers who need small-dollar emergency cash same-day, have an active checking account, and either lack access to lower-cost credit or need ancillary services like Western Union or check cashing in the same visit. The main caveat is that payday loan APRs are extremely high — this is a cost-of-last-resort product, not a competitive borrowing option for anyone who qualifies for a personal loan or credit card cash advance.
services: State-licensed lending with posted fee schedules
